title: ohigginsia refulgens
intro: O Higginsia refulgens, also known as the Red Flowered Tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ohigginsia refulgens include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
